hero.title: Right now at home
hero.usageAriaLabel: Today's usage, see usage page for details
hero.familyEmpty: No family members yet · Tap "Family" on the left to add family members
hero.cameraOfflineTitle: Cameras detected in Xiaomi Home, but miloco's perception engine can't connect yet
hero.cameraOfflineHint: The backend may not be on the same LAN as the cameras, or the cameras haven't enabled LAN mode. After checking the network, try restarting miloco or the cameras.
hero.cameraEmpty: No cameras at home yet · Connect Xiaomi Home cameras to see them here
hero.noStreaming: No cameras perceiving yet, enable one to start
hero.benchTitleFull: Maxed out at {{n}} cameras, disable one to enable another
hero.disabledOfflineHint: Camera is offline in Xiaomi Home; can't start perception. Wait for it to come back online.
hero.disabledLanHint: Camera isn't reachable on the LAN (it may be on a different network from the miloco host); make sure the host and camera are on the same LAN before enabling.
hero.disabledLensHint: Camera lens is closed; open the lens in Xiaomi Home before enabling.
hero.disabledCapacityHint: Reached the max cameras enabled at once; turn one off first.
hero.toggleTitleInUse: miloco is using this one · Tap to disable
hero.toggleTitleNotInUse: miloco isn't using this one · Tap to enable
hero.voiceTitleOn: Sound on: this camera's audio is part of perception · Tap to turn off
hero.voiceTitleOff: Sound off: this camera's audio is not processed at all · Turn it on to detect sound-related events (e.g. a child crying) · Tap to turn on
hero.voiceTitleDisabled: Camera perception is off, can't set sound
hero.voiceOnConfirmIntro: Once on, miloco processes this camera's live audio — transcribing voice commands and understanding ambient sound.
hero.voiceOnConfirmRisk: Far-field pickup misfires easily in noisy rooms, which can cause false alerts or wrong actions.
hero.voiceOnConfirmRecommend: Best in quiet rooms such as a study or bedroom.
hero.voiceOnConfirmAvoid: Not recommended for a noisy living room or rooms with a TV or speakers.
hero.modalitiesLastOffToast: Both video and audio perception are off. Re-enable in the table below.

table.title: Perception devices
table.atCapacityHint: Max {{n}} streams reached. Turn one off first.
table.testDisabled: Camera offline or perception off, can't test
